---
title: "hz-cat-cluster-analysis-IA"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# for k means clustering
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)

hz <- read_csv("../../minerva/Hazards/Datasets/DT-hzcats-society-level.csv")

sh <- read_csv("../../2026-Sharing-Analyses/sharing-dataset-for-analysis.csv")
sh <- sh %>% select(ID, allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30, allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA)

hz <- full_join(hz, sh, by = c("ID"))

  
IA_vars <- c(
  "ID",
  "disaster_est_count_30_IA",
  "normative_est_count_30_IA",
  "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA",
  "allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA"
)

# Keep IDs + variables before scaling
IA_for_clust <- hz %>%
   filter(ID != 73 & ID != 218) %>%
  select(ID, DQ, all_of(IA_vars)) %>%
  drop_na(all_of(IA_vars))


IA_scaled <- hz %>%
  select(all_of(IA_vars)) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(ID != 73 & ID != 218) %>%
  select(-ID) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))))
  


```

```{r}
fviz_nbclust(IA_scaled, kmeans, method = "wss")
```

# 4 clusters
```{r}
kmeans_pre <- kmeans(
  IA_scaled,
  centers = 5,
  nstart = 20
)

print(kmeans_pre)

fviz_cluster(kmeans_pre, data = IA_scaled)

# Table with IDs, original values, and 4-cluster assignment
cluster_table <- IA_for_clust %>%
  mutate(cluster = kmeans_pre$cluster) %>%
  arrange(cluster, ID)

```

```{r}
id_cols <- read_csv("../../minerva/Sample/Minerva-Starting-Sample.csv") %>%
  rename("ID" = "Minerva ID (SCCS 1-186, non-SCCS 201-223)")

id_cols <- id_cols %>%
  select(ID, OWC, eHRAF.Name, Region)

cluster_results <- full_join(cluster_table, id_cols, by = "ID") %>%
  relocate(DQ, .after = last_col())

write.csv(cluster_results, "results/cluster-analysis-ver-4-results.csv")
```


# boxplots

```{r}
hazard_vars <- c(
  "disaster_est_count_30_IA",
  "normative_est_count_30_IA",
  "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA",
  "allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA"
)

cluster_boxplot_data <- cluster_results %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(hazard_vars),
    names_to = "hazard_variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(cluster_boxplot_data, aes(x = cluster, y = value, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = cluster),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ hazard_variable, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Cluster",
    y = "Hazard variables",
    title = "Distribution of Hazard Variables by Cluster Category",
    fill = "Cluster"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# 3 clusters
```{r}
kmeans_pre_3 <- kmeans(
  IA_scaled,
  centers = 3,
  nstart = 20
)

print(kmeans_pre_3)

fviz_cluster(kmeans_pre_3, data = IA_scaled)

# Table with IDs, original values, and 4-cluster assignment
cluster_table_3 <- IA_for_clust %>%
  mutate(cluster = kmeans_pre_3$cluster) %>%
  arrange(cluster, ID)

```

```{r}
cluster_results_3 <- full_join(cluster_table_3, id_cols, by = "ID") %>%
  relocate(DQ, .after = last_col())

write.csv(cluster_results_3, "results/cluster-analysis-3-clusters-ver-4-results.csv")
```


# boxplots

```{r}
cluster_boxplot_data_3 <- cluster_results_3 %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(hazard_vars),
    names_to = "hazard_variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(cluster_boxplot_data_3, aes(x = cluster, y = value, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = cluster),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ hazard_variable, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Cluster",
    y = "Hazard variables",
    title = "Distribution of Hazard Variables by Cluster Category",
    fill = "Cluster"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
